name: Renewable Energy Group, Inc.
description: Renewable Energy Group, Inc. (REG) is a leading North American producer and provider of lower-carbon, renewable fuels. Headquartered in Ames, Iowa, the company specializes in the production and trade of biodiesel, renewable diesel, and renewable chemicals. REG operates a network of biorefineries and feedstock processing facilities, focusing on converting natural fats, oils, and greases into high-quality, sustainable fuel solutions. The company plays a significant role in the energy transition by helping to reduce greenhouse gas emissions through its innovative renewable fuel technologies and extensive distribution network across the United States and international markets.
